features.title: Character Development

about.storyTitle: Welcome to GLADTIDINGS INSTITUTE FOR QUR'AN MEMORIZATION AND ISLAMIC STUDIES FOR FEMALES
about.story1: Gladtidings Institute for Qur'an Memorisation and Islamic studies was founded on the 4th February, 2019 and has gone through some very stormy moments and impacted human lives. In the little space of years of existence, we had our first haflah on the 23rd December, 2023 and so far has churned out many Hufaadh(graduates).
about.story2: Also, we are registered with the corporate affairs commission and also leaving no stone unturned to take the madrasah to an enviable height. Some of the very beautiful accomplishments we've been able to record over the years are those concerning two different students. One of them, Zainab, has speech defect and her communication is poor, however, by the might of Allah she has memorised up to 4 ajza of the Qur'an.
about.story3: Also, alhamdulillah that Balqis has finished 27 ajzaa of the whole Qur'an despite her eye challenge as she could not read directly from the Qur'an. We've had to read the Qur'an repeatedly to her until it sticks to her memory. All these being made realistic by Allah are accomplishments that gladden our heart.
about.academyNote: Gladtidings Institute for Qur'an Memorization and Islamic Studies for Females is an initiative of Gladtidings Academy.
about.academyCACNote: Certificates and official documents are issued under Gladtidings Academy (CAC registered name).
about.mission: Our mission is to focus on reforming especially perverted souls through constant reflection and pondering over the meanings of the Qur'an and to ultimately restore the missing spiritual sanity back to the land.
about.vision: Our vision is to establish a morally sane society in which the free-mixing of the opposite sex is avoided and also correct the minds of pessimists who think Qur'an memorisation is an unrealistic feat.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide our approach to education and community building.
about.teamSubtitle: Our dedicated faculty brings years of experience and passion to Arabic language education.
about.journeySubtitle: The growth and milestones of GIQMIS over the years.

milestones.title: The Beginning
milestones.description: Gladtidings institute for Qur'an Memorization and Islamic Studies for Females was founded with just 15 students and 2 teachers, operating on weekends in a community center.

milestones.title: First Dedicated Space
milestones.description: With growing enrollment, we moved to our first dedicated facility and expanded to offer weekday evening classes for adults.

milestones.title: Curriculum Development
milestones.description: We developed our own comprehensive curriculum for all levels, focusing on practical communication skills and cultural immersion.

milestones.title: 5th Anniversary & Expansion
milestones.description: Celebrated our 5th anniversary with over 150 students and introduced new programs including specialized courses for professionals.

milestones.title: Online Program Launch
milestones.description: Launched our digital platform to reach students beyond our local community, offering virtual classes and resources.

milestones.title: Growing Community
milestones.description: Now serving over 300 students with a team of 12 dedicated teachers and staff, continuing our mission of language education and cultural preservation.

sponsor.pageSubtitle: Give a child the gift of Quranic education. Your generosity can change a life forever.
sponsor.whySubtitle: Every child deserves access to Islamic education regardless of their financial background.
sponsor.tiersSubtitle: Every amount makes a difference. Choose what works for you.
sponsor.ctaSubtitle: Join our growing family of sponsors and be part of a legacy that outlasts this world.
sponsor.anonymous: I would like to sponsor anonymously
sponsor.successSubtitle: We've received your sponsorship interest. Our team will contact you within 24 hours with payment details.
sponsor.livesSubtitle: These are real students whose education was made possible through the kindness of our sponsors.

students.name: Fatimah Adebayo
students.quote: This scholarship changed my life. I was able to complete my Hifdh program without my family worrying about the fees. May Allah reward every sponsor abundantly.

students.name: Zainab Musa
students.quote: Before this program I could not read the Quran properly. Today I lead recitation in my community. I am forever grateful to those who sponsored my education.

students.name: Hafsat Ibrahim
students.quote: The scholarship removed every barrier between me and my education. The teachers were patient, the community was warm, and I grew so much spiritually.

whyReasons.title: Empower Through Knowledge
whyReasons.description: Your sponsorship gives a student access to Quranic education and Islamic studies that could transform their life.

whyReasons.title: Continuous Reward (Sadaqah Jariyah)
whyReasons.description: Every verse a sponsored student memorises is a source of ongoing reward for you, even after this life.

whyReasons.title: Build a Better Community
whyReasons.description: Educated, spiritually grounded students grow into leaders who positively impact their families and communities.

whyReasons.title: Support the Vulnerable
whyReasons.description: Many of our students come from low-income families. Your help ensures financial hardship never stops a child from learning.

faqs.question: How is my sponsorship money used?
faqs.answer: Funds go directly to covering tuition, learning materials, and where needed, transport support for the sponsored student.

faqs.question: Will I know the student I am sponsoring?
faqs.answer: Yes, with the family's consent we share the student's first name, progress reports and milestone updates with you.

faqs.question: Can I sponsor anonymously?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Just indicate this in the form and we will keep your identity completely private.

faqs.question: Is there a minimum sponsorship period?
faqs.answer: We recommend at least 3 months so the student benefits meaningfully, but there is no strict minimum.

faqs.question: How do I make payment?
faqs.answer: After submitting the form our team will contact you within 24 hours with payment details via WhatsApp or email.

programs_page.sliderSubtitle: We offer a variety of programs designed to meet the needs of students of all ages and proficiency levels.
programs_page.curriculumSubtitle: We follow a comprehensive, structured curriculum based on modern language teaching methodologies.
programs_page.curriculumP1: Our curriculum integrates the four essential language skills—reading, writing, listening, and speaking—with cultural understanding to provide a holistic Arabic language education.
programs_page.curriculumP2: Each level builds progressively on previous learning, ensuring students develop strong foundations before advancing to more complex language concepts.
programs_page.faqSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about our Arabic language programs.
programs_page.ctaTitle: Begin Your Arabic Learning Journey Today
programs_page.ctaSubtitle: Join GIQMIS and discover the beauty and richness of the Arabic language and culture. Our expert teachers and proven curriculum are ready to guide you towards Arabic fluency.
